title: eMKay® Giant Snakes and Ladders Fold Out Play Mat Board Traditional Childrens Game (75cm x 75cm Approx Size)
features: ✅CLASSIC BOARD GAME: Snakes and ladder is an educational game where you have to rush to win and see who can get to the end of the board first by rolling the dice.. you'll face certain challenges along the way with this exciting game and get a buzz when the your opponent has to slide back down to the bottom!

✅GREAT ON TRAVEL: Bring the fun with you and travel with this games for kids, this game is a classic, and it's so addictive meaning that they'll be entertained for hours! Kids toys can be such a hassle whilst on the go, leave them behind and replace with this easy and tension building snakes and ladders game.

✅FAMILY GAME: Classic board games for families with kids are still great, challenge all members of your family and see who has the best strategy. Adult and children love this game, it's perfection to take out and use on a rainy day or sunny one. This game requires 2+ players so we recommend gathering the family together and playing against each other.

✅PERFECT GIFT FOR YOUNG CHILDREN: Children will be delighted to receive this board game as a birthday gift or Christmas stocking filler, it can even be put into party bags for all their friends to enjoy. Presents and gifts can be difficult to choose but now you've discovered this board game you have to get it and relish in fun!

✅PARTY GAMES: If you have friends that love fast paced games then this board game is for you. Kids party games are great when you can sit down, that's why you need this board game, conserve energy but still feel like a thrill seeker! Get together
description: Product Description eMKay Giant Snakes & Ladders Educational & Exciting : A classic game that combines fun and learning, with every dice roll bringing new challenges and excitement. Perfect for Travel : Compact and easy to carry, this game keeps kids entertained for hours without the bulk of traditional toys. Family-Friendly : Ideal for all ages, it's a fun way for families to bond and compete, whether indoors on a rainy day or outdoors in the sun. Great Gift Idea : A perfect present for birthdays or holidays, or as a fun addition to party bags, bringing joy to children of all ages. Perfect for Parties : Fast-paced and thrilling, this game adds excitement to kids’ parties, offering non-stop fun in a simple, easy-to-play format. Compact & Lightweight The game is lightweight and compact, making it easy to store and carry. Perfect for traveling or packing in a bag for on-the-go fun. Durable Construction Built to last with high-quality materials, ensuring hours of fun without wear and tear. Ideal for both kids and adults. Bright & Colourful Design The board features bright, engaging colors and large, easy-to-read numbers, making it visually appealing and fun for younger players. Safe & Non-Toxic Made with child-safe, non-toxic materials, ensuring the game is safe for kids to use and enjoy without any worries.
